_doc: Frozen-pack SHA registry + three-role pack model (Arc-1a, 2026-06-18; party-ratified Winston/Amelia/Murat). The pipeline manifest is the machine source of truth; prompt packs are operator-facing rendered/authored artifacts. Three co-resident packs serve THREE DISTINCT ROLES — they are NOT a version sequence. Guarded by check_pipeline_manifest_lockstep.py check 10 (L1, authoritative) + tests/contracts/test_frozen_pack_shas.py (broad-suite mirror).

roles.determinism-target: The live generated witness (`-gen`). Regenerated from the manifest on every change; guarded by L1 check 9 (regeneration-determinism). NOT SHA-frozen (it is supposed to move). Never hand-edited.
roles.mapping-axis-frozen: The legacy authority that slab-7-legacy-migrated-mapping-checklist.md maps its legacy axis against. SHA-frozen; never regenerated in place (Arc-1a split the determinism-witness role off it so topology refinements no longer disturb the frozen legacy axis).
roles.production-canonical: The hand-authored production narrative (`generated: false`). Runtime entrypoint app/marcus/cli/trial.py. SHA-frozen + `generated: false` sentinel = anti-regeneration tripwire (nothing should silently machine-overwrite hand-authored content).

docs/workflow/production-prompt-pack-v4..note: Frozen at the pre-Arc-1a render (legacy M->O handoffs in the §0 crosswalk). Topology refinements go to the -gen witness, never here. Direction-may-flip caveat: which pack ultimately owns the mapping axis may change as v5 evolves (see deferred-inventory).

docs/workflow/production-prompt-pack-v5-.note: Hand-authored from v4.2 via deterministic mutation pass. Has NO manifest-coherence guard by design (Murat condition 3: acceptable deferred risk for Arc-1a; the v5<->manifest reconciliation is filed with a pre-next-trial reactivation trigger in deferred-inventory). If you change v5, re-pin this SHA in the SAME commit and keep `generated: false`.

docs/workflow/production-prompt-pack-v4..note: NOT SHA-frozen — regenerated each manifest change; guarded by L1 check 9 / test_33_3_no_hand_edits_to_v42.py. Recorded here only so the three-role model is greppable in one place.
